<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
# Event Contracts

This document defines the shared event contracts for cross-app communication through `@shared/event-bus`.

---

## Contract Rules

1. Every event must be emitted via `eventBus.emit(AppEvent.<EventName>, payload)`.
2. Payloads must match the `AppEventPayload` type in `libs/shared/event-bus/src/index.ts`.
3. All payloads may include optional metadata as `meta`:
   - `sourceApp`
   - `correlationId`
   - `emittedAt`
4. Navigation requests must pass shell route sanitization allowlist checks before routing.
5. Apps must not import from other app folders. Use events for cross-app communication.

---

## Event Payload Matrix

| Event Name | Required Payload Fields | Typical Producers | Typical Consumers |
|-----------|--------------------------|-------------------|------------------|
| `RISK_UPDATED` | `riskId`, `riskLevel` | Risk Assessment | Compliance, Shell |
| `COMPLIANCE_STATUS_CHANGED` | `controlId`, `newStatus` | Compliance Dashboard | Audit, Shell |
| `AUDIT_FINDING_CREATED` | `findingId`, `severity` | Audit Management | Risk Assessment, Shell |
| `POLICY_APPROVED` | `policyId`, `version` | Policy Management | Compliance, Shell |
| `INCIDENT_CREATED` | `incidentId`, `severity` | Incident Reporting | Risk Assessment, Shell |
| `INCIDENT_RESOLVED` | `incidentId` | Incident Reporting | Shell |
| `VENDOR_RISK_CHANGED` | `vendorId`, `newRating` | Vendor Risk | Risk Assessment, Shell |
| `PARTNER_ONBOARDED` | `partnerId`, `companyName` | Partner Onboarding | Shell |
| `USER_ROLE_CHANGED` | `userId`, `newRole` | Shell and auth flow | All apps |
| `NAVIGATION_REQUESTED` | `path` | Any app | Shell router |
| `NOTIFICATION_RECEIVED` | `message`, `type` | Any app | Shell notifications |

---

## Event Examples

```ts
import { AppEvent, eventBus } from '@shared/event-bus';

eventBus.emit(AppEvent.RiskUpdated, {
  riskId: 'RISK-1024',
  riskLevel: 'high',
  meta: {
    sourceApp: 'risk-assessment',
    correlationId: '7ad4f4cd-4b8c-4d28-a1ef-3fbf92f4f98b',
    emittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  },
});
```

```ts
import { AppEvent, eventBus } from '@shared/event-bus';

eventBus.emit(AppEvent.NavigationRequested, {
  path: '/audit/findings',
  meta: {
    sourceApp: 'compliance-dashboard',
    correlationId: 'af0cb1b5-dfbe-4f67-9b2a-81408f5f94e2',
  },
});
```

---

## Verification

1. Contract tests live in `libs/shared/event-bus/src/index.contract.test.ts`.
2. Use `npm test` from repo root to validate event payload behavior and dedupe semantics.
3. For smoke checks in local runs, open the shell `Event Debug` view and trigger actions in each remote.
